'''K'vath 5''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[K'vath system]], located along the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]].

==History==
The planet was discovered by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] scouts during the [[Subterra Period]].<ref name="TEA" />

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], it was under the banner of the [[Eriadu Authority]]. As its leaders floundered, the sector would be won by the Republic.<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}

*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
